title: Opulent Strobe
description: Ce style reproduit l'esthétique de la photographie argentique de mode des années 1990, caractérisée par un flash direct et dur qui isole le premier plan sur un fond sombre et sous-exposé. Il met en valeur des textures maximalistes et tactiles avec des reflets spéculaires éclatants, des tons saturés contrastant avec des ombres écrasées, et un grain de film analogique distinct.
description_en: This style replicates the aesthetic of 1990s high-fashion editorial film photography, characterized by a direct, harsh strobe light that isolates the foreground against a moody, underexposed background. It emphasizes maximalist, tactile textures with glowing specular highlights, saturated tones contrasting with crushed shadows, and a distinct analog film grain.
description_fr: Ce style reproduit l'esthétique de la photographie argentique de mode des années 1990, caractérisée par un flash direct et dur qui isole le premier plan sur un fond sombre et sous-exposé. Il met en valeur des textures maximalistes et tactiles avec des reflets spéculaires éclatants, des tons saturés contrastant avec des ombres écrasées, et un grain de film analogique distinct.
prompt: 1990s high-fashion editorial film photography, 35mm analog camera aesthetic. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution relies on a distinct, direct, harsh on-camera strobe flash that aggressively illuminates the foreground elements, creating a stark, high-contrast separation from a moody, underexposed background. Lighting features rapid fall-off into deep, crushed black shadows, punctuated by soft, warm ambient practical lights glowing faintly in the distant depth. Colors are driven by highly saturated, intensely lit {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} hues in the foreground that pop vibrantly against the dark, moody {{secondary_color}} tones of the surrounding obscurity. Textures are rendered with extreme tactile clarity under the flash: reflective surfaces produce sharp, blooming specular highlights, while soft or intricate materials reveal every detail. The overall atmosphere is one of maximalist decadence and cinematic drama, enhanced by a pronounced analog film grain, subtle halation around bright light sources, and a shallow depth of field that blurs the cluttered background into atmospheric obscurity. Edges in the foreground are crisp and meticulously defined by the strobe, while background elements melt softly into the shadows. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. Tags: 35mm film photography, editorial strobe, direct flash, maximalist atmosphere, crushed shadows, specular highlights, analog film grain, tactile materiality, opulent lighting, cinematic depth, high contrast, halation, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame.
prompt_removebg: 1990s high-fashion editorial film photography, 35mm analog camera aesthetic. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution relies on a distinct, direct, harsh on-camera strobe flash that aggressively illuminates the elements, composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. Lighting features rapid fall-off into deep shadows that interact naturally with the {{background_color}}, punctuated by soft, warm ambient practical lighting effects. Colors are driven by highly saturated, intensely lit {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} hues that pop vibrantly against the contrasting {{secondary_color}} tones and the flat {{background_color}} backdrop. Textures are rendered with extreme tactile clarity under the flash: reflective surfaces produce sharp, blooming specular highlights, while soft or intricate materials reveal every detail. The overall atmosphere is one of maximalist decadence and cinematic drama, enhanced by a pronounced analog film grain and subtle halation around bright light sources. Edges are crisp and meticulously defined by the strobe, casting stark, realistic drop shadows directly onto the {{background_color}}, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame. Tags: 35mm film photography, editorial strobe, direct flash, maximalist atmosphere, crushed shadows, specular highlights, analog film grain, tactile materiality, opulent lighting, cinematic depth, high contrast, halation, isolated subject, solid backdrop.
background_prompt: A cluttered, opulent, maximalist interior environment rendered in 1990s high-fashion editorial 35mm film photography style. The scene features deep, crushed {{secondary_color}} shadows punctuated by warm, glowing ambient practical lights and a harsh, off-camera strobe flash hitting scattered reflective surfaces. Highly saturated {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} elements emerge from the moody obscurity. Pronounced analog film grain, blooming specular highlights, and a shallow depth of field create a cinematic, decadent atmosphere entirely devoid of central subjects.
background_prompt_removebg: A cluttered, opulent, maximalist interior environment rendered in 1990s high-fashion editorial 35mm film photography style. The scene features deep, crushed {{secondary_color}} shadows punctuated by warm, glowing ambient practical lights and a harsh strobe flash hitting scattered reflective surfaces. Highly saturated {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} elements emerge from the moody obscurity. A decadent, out-of-focus foreground vignette of soft, fluffy textures and sparkling crystal facets frames the scene, casting stark strobe shadows that transition seamlessly into a flat {{background_color}} surface. Pronounced analog film grain and blooming specular highlights create a cinematic atmosphere.
